name: Minnesota Valley
description_short: This is not a financial company—it's an educational reference website about U.S. state information, government, and geography.
description_long: Minnesota Valley does not appear to exist as a financial services company. The provided URL (https://www.50states.com/minnesota.htm) is a general-reference website operated by 50states.com that provides factual information about Minnesota's state symbols, government structure, geography, economy, and educational institutions. The website contains no financial products, lending services, credit offerings, or consumer finance information of any kind. The current categorization as 'payday-alternatives' is entirely incorrect. The website is purely informational and serves as a civics and geography resource. There is no company named 'Minnesota Valley' operating any financial services through this domain. The content includes state facts, government contacts, area codes, and educational institution directories—none of which relate to consumer finance. This profile cannot be completed as requested because the entity specified does not operate as a financial services provider.
